quote: Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget Rule No. 1.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Our favorite holding period is forever.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Only buy something that you'd be perfectly happy to hold if the market shut down for 10 years.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Never invest in a business you cannot understand.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The most important quality for an investor is temperament, not intellect.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Wide diversification is only required when investors do not understand what they are doing.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: It takes 20 years to build a reputation and five minutes to ruin it.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Chains of habit are too light to be felt until they are too heavy to be broken.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Someone's sitting in the shade today because someone planted a tree a long time ago.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: You only have to do a very few things right in your life so long as you don't do too many things wrong.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The difference between successful people and really successful people is that really successful people say no to almost everything.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: In the business world, the rearview mirror is always clearer than the windshield.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I never attempt to make money on the stock market. I buy on the assumption that they could close the market the next day and not reopen it for five years.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The best thing that happens to us is when a great company gets into temporary trouble. We want to buy them when they're on the operating table.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Time is the friend of the wonderful company, the enemy of the mediocre.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: If you aren't willing to own a stock for ten years, don't even think about owning it for ten minutes.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Predicting rain doesn't count. Building arks does.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Cash combined with courage in a time of crisis is priceless.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Wall Street is the only place that people ride to in a Rolls-Royce to get advice from those who take the subway.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Do not save what is left after spending; instead spend what is left after saving.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The investor of today does not profit from yesterday's growth.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Opportunities come infrequently. When it rains gold, put out the bucket, not the thimble.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: You don't need to be a rocket scientist. Investing is not a game where the guy with the 160 IQ beats the guy with 130 IQ.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: What the wise do in the beginning, fools do in the end.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: It's only when the tide goes out that you learn who's been swimming naked.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The best investment you can make is in yourself.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We simply attempt to be fearful when others are greedy and to be greedy only when others are fearful.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Honesty is a very expensive gift. Don't expect it from cheap people.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Buy a stock the way you would buy a house. Understand and like it such that you'd be content to own it in the absence of any market.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I will tell you how to become rich. Close the doors. Be fearful when others are greedy. Be greedy when others are fearful.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: There seems to be some perverse human characteristic that likes to make easy things difficult.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The key to investing is not assessing how much an industry is going to affect society, but rather determining the competitive advantage of any given company.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: If past history was all there was to the game, the richest people would be librarians.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I insist on a lot of time being spent, almost every day, to just sit and think.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The business schools reward difficult complex behavior more than simple behavior, but simple behavior is more effective.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Accounting is the language of business.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I don't look to jump over seven-foot bars; I look around for one-foot bars that I can step over.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We don't have to be smarter than the rest. We have to be more disciplined than the rest.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: A public-opinion poll is no substitute for thought.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: If a business does well, the stock eventually follows.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Look at market fluctuations as your friend rather than your enemy; profit from folly rather than participate in it.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: An investor should act as though he had a lifetime decision card with just twenty punches on it.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The most important thing to do if you find yourself in a hole is to stop digging.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We enjoy the process far more than the proceeds.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Diversification is protection against ignorance. It makes little sense if you know what you are doing.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I always knew I was going to be rich. I don't think I ever doubted it for a minute.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Your premium brand had better be delivering something special, or it's not going to get the business.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: You can't produce a baby in one month by getting nine women pregnant.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The smarter the journalists are, the better off society is.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I try to buy stock in businesses that are so wonderful that an idiot can run them. Because sooner or later, one will.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: When a management with a reputation for brilliance tackles a business with a reputation for bad economics, it is the reputation of the business that remains intact.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Should you find yourself in a chronically leaking boat, energy devoted to changing vessels is likely to be more productive than energy devoted to patching leaks.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The one thing I will tell you is the worst investment you can have is cash. Everybody is talking about cash being king and all that sort of thing. Cash is going to become worth less over time.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: It is not necessary to do extraordinary things to get extraordinary results.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Games are won by players who focus on the playing field, not by those whose eyes are glued to the scoreboard.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We always live in an uncertain world. What is certain is that the United States will go forward over time.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: A great investment opportunity occurs when a marvelous business encounters a one-time huge, but solvable problem.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The only way to get love is to be lovable. You'd like to think you could write a check: I'll buy a million dollars' worth of love. But it doesn't work that way.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We like to buy businesses. We don't like to sell and we expect the relationships to last a lifetime.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Beware the investment activity that produces applause; the great moves are usually greeted by yawns.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: In the world of business, the people who are most successful are those who are doing what they love.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: If you've been playing poker for half an hour and you still don't know who the patsy is, you're the patsy.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I would say the most satisfying thing actually is watching my three children each pick up on the values that their mother and I really believe in.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Read 500 pages every day. That's how knowledge works. It builds up, like compound interest.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I buy expensive suits. They just look cheap on me.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: You know, people talk about this being an uncertain time. You know, all time is uncertain. It was uncertain back in 2007, we just didn't know it.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The best chance to deploy capital is when things are going down.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: If you get to my age in life and nobody thinks well of you, I don't care how big your bank account is, your life is a disaster.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Economic medicine that was previously meted out by the cupful has recently been dispensed by the barrel.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: There is nothing wrong with a know-nothing investor who realizes it. The problem is when you are a know-nothing investor but you think you know something.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We never want to count on the kindness of strangers in order to meet tomorrow's obligations.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The rich invest in time, the poor invest in money.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Only when you combine sound intellect with emotional discipline do you get rational behavior.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: When we own portions of outstanding businesses with outstanding managements, our favorite holding period is forever.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: You've gotta keep control of your time, and you can't unless you say no. You can't let people set your agenda in life.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I always knew I was going to be rich. I don't think I ever doubted it for a minute.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Half of all coin-flippers will win their first toss; none of those winners has an expectation of profit if he continues to play the game.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We've long felt that the only value of stock forecasters is to make fortune tellers look good.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The investor who says 'this time is different' when in fact it's virtually identical to the last time is the one who gets burned.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I make no attempt to forecast the market. My efforts are devoted to finding undervalued securities.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Investors should remember that excitement and expenses are their enemies.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The fact that people are full of greed, fear, or folly is predictable. The sequence is not predictable.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We will reject interesting opportunities rather than over-leverage our balance sheet.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Turnarounds seldom turn.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Our goal is to find an outstanding business at a sensible price, not a mediocre business at a bargain price.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We never want to count on the kindness of strangers in order to meet tomorrow's obligations.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Lethargy bordering on sloth remains the cornerstone of our investment style.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I am a better investor because I am a businessman, and a better businessman because I am an investor.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We have no idea how long the excesses will last, nor do we know what will change the attitudes of government, lender, and buyer that fuel them.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: I don't measure my success by the money I've made. I measure it by the number of people I've helped.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The market, like the Lord, helps those who help themselves. But, unlike the Lord, the market does not forgive those who know not what they do.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: What counts for most people in investing is not how much they know, but rather how realistically they define what they don't know.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: We've used debt sparingly. When we do borrow, we attempt to structure our loans on a long-term fixed-rate basis.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: After all, you only find out who is swimming naked when the tide goes out.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The line separating investment and speculation, which is never bright and clear, becomes blurred still further when most market participants have recently enjoyed triumphs.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Knowing what you don't know is more useful than being brilliant.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Invert, always invert. Turn a situation or problem upside down. Look at it backward.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The big money is not in the buying or selling, but in the waiting.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Spend each day trying to be a little wiser than you were when you woke up.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The desire to get rich fast is pretty dangerous.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: You don't have to be brilliant, only a little bit wiser than the other guys, on average, for a long, long time.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: People are trying to be smart. All I am trying to do is not to be idiotic, but it's harder than most people think.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: It is remarkable how much long-term advantage people like us have gotten by trying to be consistently not stupid, instead of trying to be very intelligent.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Those who keep learning, will keep rising in life.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: A great business at a fair price is superior to a fair business at a great price.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Develop into a lifelong self-learner through voracious reading; cultivate curiosity and strive to become a little wiser every day.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The safest way to try to get what you want is to try to deserve what you want.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: If you don't get this elementary, but mildly unnatural, parsing of experience into what's a cost and what's a benefit, you're going to be a disaster.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Like Warren, I had a considerable passion to get rich, not because I wanted Ferraris but because I wanted the independence.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: All I want to know is where I'm going to die, so I'll never go there.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: If you have a strong enough commitment to thinking about the right things and learning the right things, you can become a great investor.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: You need to have a passionate interest in why things are happening. That cast of mind, kept over long periods, gradually improves your ability to focus.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The iron rule of nature is: you get what you reward for. If you want ants to come, you put sugar on the floor.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: We all are learning, modifying, or destroying ideas all the time. Rapid destruction of your ideas when the time is right is one of the most valuable qualities.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Mimicking the herd invites regression to the mean.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: There is no better teacher than history in determining the future. There are answers worth billions of dollars in a $30 history book.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: We both insist on a lot of time being available almost every day to just sit and think. That is very uncommon in American business.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Part of what you must learn is how to handle mistakes and new facts that change the odds. Life, in part, is like a poker game.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Three rules for a career: 1) Don't sell anything you wouldn't buy yourself. 2) Don't work for anyone you don't respect. 3) Work only with people you enjoy.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I try to get rid of people who always confidently answer questions about which they don't have any real knowledge.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: You should never, when faced with one unbelievable tragedy, let one tragedy increase into two or three through your failure of will.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I think track records are very important. If you start early trying to have a perfect one in some simple thing like honesty, you're well on your way to success.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Envy is a really stupid sin because it's the only one you could never possibly have any fun at.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I think that, every time you see the word EBITDA, you should substitute the words 'bullshit earnings'.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: A lot of people with high IQs are terrible investors because they've got terrible temperaments.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The idea of excessive diversification is madness.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: If you take the best text in economics by Mankiw, he says intelligent people make decisions based on opportunity costs. It's obvious.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Acknowledging what you don't know is the dawning of wisdom.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: There are huge advantages for an individual to get into a position where you make a few great investments and just sit on your ass.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Take a simple idea and take it seriously.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The acquisition of wisdom is a moral duty. It's not something you do just to advance in life.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: We read a lot. I don't know anyone who's wise who doesn't read a lot. But that's not enough: you have to have a temperament to grab ideas and do sensible things.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: You must force yourself to consider opposing arguments. Especially when they challenge your best-loved ideas.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Show me the incentive and I'll show you the outcome.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I think life is a whole series of opportunity costs. You've got to marry the best person who is convenient to find who will have you.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The most important word in the world of finance is 'no'.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The number one idea is to view a stock as an ownership of the business and to judge the staying quality of the business in terms of its competitive advantage.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: It's waiting that helps you as an investor, and a lot of people just can't stand to wait.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Simplicity has a way of improving performance through enabling us to better understand what we are doing.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I never allow myself to have an opinion on anything that I don't know the other side's argument better than they do.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: In my whole life, I have known no wise people who didn't read all the time. None. Zero.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Our job is to find a few intelligent things to do, not to keep up with every damn thing in the world.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: If something is too hard, we move on to something else. What could be simpler than that?
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Revenge is a dish best not served at all.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Wisdom acquisition is a moral duty. You are not going to get very far in life based on what you already know.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I constantly see people rise in life who are not the smartest, sometimes not even the most diligent, but they are learning machines.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Confucius said that real knowledge is knowing the extent of one's ignorance. That's true and Aristotle and Socrates said the same thing.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The first rule of compounding: Never interrupt it unnecessarily.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: To get what you want, you have to deserve what you want. The world is not yet a crazy enough place to reward a whole bunch of undeserving people.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Avoid extremely intense ideology because it ruins your mind.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I believe in the discipline of mastering the best that other people have ever figured out. I don't believe in just sitting down and trying to dream it all up yourself.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: Another thing to cope with is that life is very likely to provide hard knocks. Knowing that there will be reverses makes you better prepared.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: I have never succeeded very much in anything in which I was not very interested.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: You must know the big ideas in the big disciplines and use them routinely — all of them, not just a few.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The best armor of old age is a well-spent life preceding it.
author: Charlie Munger

quote: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: In the short run, the market is a voting machine but in the long run, it is a weighing machine.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The intelligent investor is a realist who sells to optimists and buys from pessimists.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The margin of safety is always dependent on the price paid.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: To achieve satisfactory investment results is easier than most people realize; to achieve superior results is harder than it looks.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: An investment operation is one which, upon thorough analysis, promises safety of principal and an adequate return.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The investor's chief problem — and even his worst enemy — is likely to be himself.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Have the courage of your knowledge and experience. If you have formed a conclusion from the facts and if you know your judgment is sound, act on it.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Buy not on optimism, but on arithmetic.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Confronted with a challenge to distill the secret of sound investment into three words, we venture the motto: Margin of Safety.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The essence of investment management is the management of risks, not the management of returns.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Those who do not remember the past are condemned to repeat it.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The best way to measure your investing success is not by whether you're beating the market but by whether you've put in place a financial plan and a behavioral discipline that are likely to get you where you want to go.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: You are neither right nor wrong because the crowd disagrees with you. You are right because your data and reasoning are right.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Obvious prospects for physical growth in a business do not translate into obvious profits for investors.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: People who invest make money for themselves; people who speculate make money for their brokers.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Successful investing professionals are disciplined and consistent, and they think a great deal about what they do and how they do it.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The speculator's primary interest lies in anticipating and profiting from market fluctuations. The investor's primary interest lies in acquiring and holding suitable securities at suitable prices.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: While enthusiasm may be necessary for great accomplishments elsewhere, on Wall Street it almost invariably leads to disaster.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The market is fond of making mountains out of molehills and exaggerating ordinary vicissitudes into major setbacks.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Experience teaches that the time to buy stocks is when their price is unduly depressed by temporary adversity.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Most of the time stocks are subject to irrational and excessive price fluctuations in both directions as the consequence of the ingrained tendency of most people to speculate or gamble.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: If you are shopping for common stocks, choose them the way you would buy groceries, not the way you would buy perfume.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The defensive investor must confine himself to the shares of important companies with a long record of profitable operations and in strong financial condition.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Investing isn't about beating others at their game. It's about controlling yourself at your own game.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The purpose of the margin of safety is to render the forecast unnecessary.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: A true investment is one that upon thorough analysis, promises safety of principal and a satisfactory return. Operations not meeting these requirements are speculative.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: By developing your discipline and courage, you can refuse to let other people's mood swings govern your financial destiny.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Abnormally good or abnormally bad conditions do not last forever.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Loss of perspective leading to loss of capital.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Wall Street people learn nothing and forget everything.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Investment is most intelligent when it is most businesslike.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The more it changes, the more it's the same thing. I've always thought this motto applied to the stock market better than anywhere else.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Mr. Market is there to serve you, not to guide you. It is his pocketbook, not his wisdom, that you will find useful.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The habit of relating what is paid to what is being offered is an invaluable trait in investment.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Safety must be based on study and standards.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The investor who permits himself to be stampeded or unduly worried by unjustified market declines in his holdings is perversely transforming his basic advantage into a basic disadvantage.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: No matter how careful you are, the one risk no investor can ever eliminate is the risk of being wrong.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Go for a business that any idiot can run — because sooner or later, any idiot probably is going to run it.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The key to making money in stocks is not to get scared out of them.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: In this business, if you're good, you're right six times out of ten.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: People who succeed in the stock market also accept periodic losses, setbacks, and unexpected occurrences.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Everyone has the brainpower to make money in stocks. Not everyone has the stomach.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Investing without research is like playing stud poker and never looking at the cards.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The person that turns over the most rocks wins the game.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Although it's easy to forget sometimes, a share is not a lottery ticket. It's part-ownership of a business.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Far more money has been lost by investors preparing for corrections, or trying to anticipate corrections, than has been lost in corrections themselves.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: If you spend more than 13 minutes analyzing economic and market forecasts, you've wasted 10 minutes.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Time is on your side when you own shares of superior companies.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Behind every stock is a company. Find out what it's doing.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The trick is not to learn to trust your gut feelings, but rather to discipline yourself to ignore them.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: During the Gold Rush, most would-be miners lost money, but people who sold them picks, shovels, tents, and blue-jeans made a nice profit.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: When you sell in desperation, you always sell cheap.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Owning stocks is like having children — don't get involved with more than you can handle.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: If you don't study any companies, you have the same success buying stocks as you do in a poker game if you bet without looking at your cards.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Your investor's edge is not something you get from Wall Street experts. It's something you already have.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: A stock market decline is as routine as a January blizzard in Colorado. If you're prepared, it can't hurt you.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The real key to making money in stocks is not to get scared out of them.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Selling your winners and holding your losers is like cutting the flowers and watering the weeds.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: I've found that when the market's going down and you buy funds wisely, at some point in the future you will be happy.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: There is always something to worry about. Avoid weekend thinking and ignore the latest dire predictions of the newscasters.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: You get recessions, you have stock market declines. If you don't understand that's going to happen, then you're not ready, you won't do well in the markets.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Invest in what you know.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Charts and technical analysis don't work. Realize that the macro is unknowable.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: The best stock to buy may be the one you already own.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Long shots almost always miss the mark.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: Never invest in any idea you can't illustrate with a crayon.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: He who lives by the crystal ball will eat shattered glass.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Pain plus reflection equals progress.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: If you're not failing, you're not pushing your limits, and if you're not pushing your limits, you're not maximizing your potential.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Don't let the fears of what others think of you stand in your way.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: The biggest mistake investors make is to believe that what happened in the recent past is likely to persist.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Diversifying well is the most important thing you need to do in order to invest well.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Think for yourself to decide what you want, what is true, and what you should do to achieve #1 in light of #2.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Every time you confront something painful, you are at a potentially important juncture in your life — you have the opportunity to choose healthy and painful truth or unhealthy but comfortable delusion.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: More than anything else, what differentiates people who live up to their potential from those who don't is a willingness to look at themselves and others objectively.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Truth — or, more precisely, an accurate understanding of reality — is the essential foundation for any good outcome.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Maturity is the ability to reject good alternatives in order to pursue even better ones.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: I learned that if you work hard and creatively, you can have just about anything you want, but not everything you want.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Radical open-mindedness and radical transparency are invaluable for rapid learning and effective change.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Don't worry about looking good — worry about achieving your goals.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Believe it or not, your pain will fade and you will have many other opportunities ahead of you, though you might not see them at the time.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: I believe that the biggest problem that humanity faces is an ego sensitivity to finding out whether one is right or wrong.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Listening to uninformed people is worse than having no answers at all.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: People who worry about looking good typically hide what they don't know and hide their weaknesses, so they never learn how to properly deal with them.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Time is like a river that carries us forward into encounters with reality that require us to make decisions. We can't stop our movement down this river and we can't avoid those encounters.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: If you can think of the problem as a set of outcomes relative to a set of probabilities, you can come up with the best decision.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Remember that the only way to make money is to find things that are cheap relative to their true worth.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: The most important thing is that you develop your own principles and ideally write them down.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Look for the cleverest people who disagree with you to try to understand their reasoning.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: An economy is simply the sum total of the transactions that make it up.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Make your passion and your work one and the same and give it your all.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: I just want to be right — I don't care if the right answer comes from me.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Nature is a machine. The family is a machine. The life cycle is like a machine.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: Constantly ask yourself what you are missing.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: To be effective you must not let your need to be right be more important than your need to find out what's true.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: The most valuable habit I've acquired is using pain to trigger quality reflections.
author: Ray Dalio

quote: The stock market is the story of cycles and of the human behaviour that is responsible for overreactions in both directions.
author: Seth Klarman

quote: The single greatest edge an investor can have is a long-term orientation.
author: Seth Klarman

quote: Growth stocks may reward more but are riskier. Value stocks may appear dull but are more predictable.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: I don't want a lot of good investments; I want a few outstanding ones.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: The best time to sell a stock is almost never.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Conservative investors sleep well.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: I remember my first mistake buying a stock after thoroughly studying it was in 1929.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Doing what everybody else is doing at the moment, and therefore what you have an almost irresistible urge to do, is often the wrong thing to do at all.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Usually a very long list of securities is not a sign of the brilliant investor, but of one who is unsure of himself.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Successful investing is about managing risk, not avoiding it.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: When buying a stock, I find it helpful to buy near the low of the past few years.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: It is not the profit margins of the past but those of the future that are basically important to the investor.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: The successful investor is usually an individual who is inherently interested in business problems.
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Is the company developing or maintaining products or services with sufficient market potential to make possible a sizable increase in sales for at least several years?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have a worthwhile profit margin?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: What is the company doing to maintain or improve profit margins?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have outstanding labor and personnel relations?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have outstanding executive relations?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have depth to its management?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have good cost analysis and accounting controls?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the management have a short-range or long-range outlook in regard to profits?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the management talk freely to investors about its affairs when things are going well but clam up when troubles and disappointments occur?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have a management of unquestionable integrity?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: How good are the company's research and development efforts in relation to its size?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Does the company have an above-average sales organization?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: Are there other aspects of the business that will give the investor important clues as to how outstanding the company may be in relation to its competition?
author: Philip Fisher

quote: The most important thing is to be able to resist the temptation to do something when doing nothing is the correct course of action.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The most dangerous thing is to buy something at the peak of its popularity.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Investment success doesn't come from buying good things, but rather from buying things well.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The biggest investing errors come not from factors that are informational or analytical, but from those that are psychological.
author: Howard Marks

quote: You can't predict. You can prepare.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Risk means more things can happen than will happen.
author: Howard Marks

quote: There are two kinds of people who lose money: those who know nothing and those who know everything.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Being too far ahead of your time is indistinguishable from being wrong.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The most important thing is to be a contrarian when the facts are on your side.
author: Howard Marks

quote: There's a big difference between probability and outcome. Probable things fail to happen — and improbable things happen — all the time.
author: Howard Marks

quote: We have to practice defensive investing, since many of the outcomes are likely to go against us.
author: Howard Marks

quote: An investor needs to do very few things right as long as he avoids big mistakes.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The market has a mind of its own and its movements can't be predicted with any consistency.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Skepticism and pessimism aren't synonymous. Skepticism calls for pessimism when optimism is excessive. But it also calls for optimism when pessimism is excessive.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Most people seem to think outstanding performance to date presages outstanding future performance. Actually, it's more likely that outstanding performance to date has borrowed from the future.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The relationship between different kinds of investments and inflation is not a simple, dependable one.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Moving aggressively in the face of loss is not something that can be done readily or easily. It requires the ability to look past the immediate crisis.
author: Howard Marks

quote: To be a successful contrarian you have to be able to recognize when the herd is doing the wrong thing and have the courage to go the other way.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Second-level thinking is deep, complex, and convoluted.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The thing I find most interesting about investing is how paradoxical it is: how often the things that seem most obvious — that everyone agrees on — turn out not to be true.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Good times teach only bad lessons: that investing is easy, that you know its secrets, and that you need not worry about risk.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Unconventionality shouldn't be a goal in itself, but rather a way of thinking.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Consistency and patience are the most important elements of a long-term strategy.
author: Howard Marks

quote: Understanding that we can't forecast doesn't mean we can't deal with the future.
author: Howard Marks

quote: When there's nothing particularly clever to do, the potential pitfall lies in insisting on being clever.
author: Howard Marks

quote: It's not what you buy. It's what you pay.
author: Howard Marks

quote: The market is not a weighing machine on which the value of each issue is recorded by an exact and impersonal mechanism. Rather, it is a voting machine where countless individuals register choices which are the product partly of reason and partly of emotion.
author: George Soros

quote: It's not whether you're right or wrong that's important, but how much money you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.
author: George Soros

quote: Once we realize that imperfect understanding is the human condition there is no shame in being wrong, only in failing to correct our mistakes.
author: George Soros

quote: Markets are constantly in a state of uncertainty and flux, and money is made by discounting the obvious and betting on the unexpected.
author: George Soros

quote: The financial markets generally are unpredictable. So that one has to have different scenarios. The idea that you can actually predict what's going to happen contradicts my way of looking at the market.
author: George Soros

quote: If investing is entertaining, if you're having fun, you're probably not making any money. Good investing is boring.
author: George Soros

quote: I'm only rich because I know when I'm wrong. I basically have survived by recognizing my mistakes.
author: George Soros

quote: The worse a situation becomes, the less it takes to turn it around, the bigger the upside.
author: George Soros

quote: Stock market bubbles don't grow out of thin air. They have a solid basis in reality, but reality as distorted by a misconception.
author: George Soros

quote: To buy when others are despondently selling and to sell when others are greedily buying requires the greatest fortitude and pays the greatest reward.
author: George Soros

quote: Find the trend whose premise is false, and bet against it.
author: George Soros

quote: My approach works not by making valid predictions but by allowing me to correct false ones.
author: George Soros

quote: I am not a professional security analyst. I would rather call myself an insecurity analyst.
author: George Soros

quote: We try to catch new trends early and in later stages we try to catch trend reversals. Therefore, we tend to stabilize rather than destabilize the market.
author: George Soros

quote: The hardest thing to judge is what level of risk is safe.
author: George Soros

quote: Bargains are the holy grail of the true stock picker.
author: John Templeton

quote: The four most dangerous words in investing are: 'This time it's different.'
author: John Templeton

quote: Bull markets are born on pessimism, grow on skepticism, mature on optimism, and die on euphoria.
author: John Templeton

quote: If you want to have a better performance than the crowd, you must do things differently from the crowd.
author: John Templeton

quote: To buy when others are despondently selling and to sell when others are avidly buying requires the greatest fortitude and pays the greatest ultimate rewards.
author: John Templeton

quote: The time of maximum pessimism is the best time to buy, and the time of maximum optimism is the best time to sell.
author: John Templeton

quote: An investor who has all the answers doesn't even understand all the questions.
author: John Templeton

quote: It is impossible to produce a superior performance unless you do something different from the majority.
author: John Templeton

quote: Focus on value because most investors focus on outlooks and trends.
author: John Templeton

quote: If you begin with prayer, you can think more clearly and make fewer stupid mistakes.
author: John Templeton

quote: The only investors who shouldn't diversify are those who are right 100% of the time.
author: John Templeton

quote: Invest at the point of maximum pessimism.
author: John Templeton

quote: For all long-term investors, there is only one objective: maximum total real return after taxes.
author: John Templeton

quote: Do not be fearful or negative too often.
author: John Templeton

quote: Help yourself by helping others. This is the most rewarding of all the templeton principles.
author: John Templeton

quote: In investing, what is comfortable is rarely profitable.
author: Robert Arnott

quote: The four most expensive words in the English language are 'this time it's different.'
author: John Templeton

quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it. He who doesn't, pays it.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The stock market is designed to transfer money from the active to the patient.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: October. This is one of the peculiarly dangerous months to speculate in stocks. The others are July, January, September, April, November, May, March, June, December, August, and February.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
author: Epictetus

quote: The goal of a successful trader is to make the best trades. Money is secondary.
author: Alexander Elder

quote: Investing should be more like watching paint dry or watching grass grow. If you want excitement, take $800 and go to Las Vegas.
author: Paul Samuelson

quote: The market can remain irrational longer than you can remain solvent.
author: John Maynard Keynes

quote: When the facts change, I change my mind. What do you do, sir?
author: John Maynard Keynes

quote: The avoidance of taxes is the only intellectual pursuit that carries any reward.
author: John Maynard Keynes

quote: I will tell you the secret to getting rich on Wall Street. You try to be greedy when others are fearful. And you try to be fearful when others are greedy.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: Returns matter a lot. It's our capital.
author: Abigail Johnson

quote: I think you have to learn that there's a company behind every stock, and that there's only one real reason why stocks go up. Companies go from doing poorly to doing well or small companies grow to large companies.
author: Peter Lynch

quote: How many millionaires do you know who have become wealthy by investing in savings accounts? I rest my case.
author: Robert G. Allen

quote: Every once in a while, the market does something so stupid it takes your breath away.
author: Jim Cramer

quote: Do you know the only thing that gives me pleasure? It's to see my dividends coming in.
author: John D. Rockefeller

quote: Courage taught me no matter how bad a crisis gets, any sound investment will eventually pay off.
author: Carlos Slim

quote: The wise man put all his eggs in one basket and watched the basket.
author: Andrew Carnegie

quote: Money is only a tool. It will take you wherever you wish, but it will not replace you as the driver.
author: Ayn Rand
